title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF ROMBLON NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL-ODIONGAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ODIONGAN, PROVINCE OF ROMBLON TO ODIONGAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 5923; 108 OG No. 52, 6532 (December 24, 2012)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10333, November 15, 2012 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF ROMBLON NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL-ODIONGAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ODIONGAN, PROVINCE OF ROMBLON TO ODIONGAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Renaming of a National High School.

â The name of Romblon National High School - Odiongan in the Municipality of Odiongan, Province of Romblon is hereby changed to Odiongan National High School.

SEC. 2.

Location of the Main Campus.

- The main campus of the Odiongan National High School shall continue to remain in its present location in the Municipality of Odiongan, Province of Romblon.

SEC. 3.

Effectivity.

- This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE

President of the Senate

(Sgd.) FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on March 21, 2012 and August 28, 2012, respectively.

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: NOV 15 2012

(Sgd.) BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
